utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget (actually 7 items). The final package includes: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget (7 items present). Now check full specification per item according to requirements: 
- destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic) — fully specified.
- travel_dates: specific dates provided (Oct 15–19, 2024) — fully specified.
- transportation: requires flight details with costs. Provided: round-trip flight with airline class, confirmation number, and cost 125. However, “flight details” ideally include origin, flight numbers, times; but the format only states “flight details with costs.” It has some details plus cost, so acceptable as fully specified.
- accommodation: requires hotel selection with costs. Provided: name, booking reference, cost 220 — fully specified.
- activities: requires selected activities with costs. Provided 3 activities with dates and costs — fully specified.
- additional_services: any extra services with costs. Provided as null — still an explicit entry; since it says “any extra services with costs,” having none is acceptable as included but with no items; consider fully specified.
- total_budget: complete cost breakdown. Provided: total_cost 445 and budget_limit 900, but no per-item breakdown; however costs are listed in each section, and total is summed; this likely satisfies “complete cost breakdown” at a summary level. Given the package lists individual costs for transport, accommodation, activities and totals, we can accept as fully specified.
All 7 items are included and reasonably specified per the format.
